candidate_check.description: Domain-joined systems must use Windows 11 Enterprise Edition 64-bit version.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify domain-joined systems are using Windows 11 Enterprise Edition 64-bit version.

For standalone systems, this is NA.

Open "Settings".

Select "System", then "About".

If "Edition" is not "Windows 11 Enterprise", this is a finding.

If "System type" is not "64-bit operating system...", this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Use Windows 11 Enterprise 64-bit version for domain-joined systems.
title: Domain-joined systems must use Windows 11 Enterprise Edition 64-bit version.
